title: Estate-wide RBAC grants
description: Role assignments that exceed a single repo's resource-group scope (e.g. subscription-scope read access for a user-assigned managed identity). Applied idempotently by scripts/apply-role-grants.ps1 during onboarding — repo-scoped RBAC belongs in each repo's own Bicep instead.

comment.description: Why this grant exists — required reading for whoever reviews changes here.

identityName.description: Name of the user-assigned managed identity receiving the roles.

scope.description: Assignment scope. Only subscription is supported — anything narrower belongs in the owning repo's Bicep.

roles.description: Built-in role names to assign (e.g. Reader, Log Analytics Reader).
